mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (post_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
